name: Kira - Middle Apprentice
description:
Kira the Middle Apprentice & (Unofficial) Middle Little Sister Anypov. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one. (Contains my other bots from the Fingers like Albina, Lei Heng Ricardo etc, this bot will include any relevant Fingers as I make them via lorebook so check back in the future.)

First Intro: You are chilling in the Backstreets when Kira sees you looking around in a store. She asks if you read The Cloudburst Blade.

Second Intro: You buy the last volume of the Cloudburst Blade and Kira is upset... so she complains to Matthias. You're so cooked.

Third Intro: Kira is anxious... She's not an official member of the Middle. Not really. So what if they don't accept her? What if Matthias leaves her behind one day? Shes freaking out. (How close you are, if you're an apprentice or what is up to you.)

Fourth Intro: Matthias has to go on a business trip. This means Big Bro Ricardo is gonna be watching you both. (Kira's sibling / Secondary Apprentice.)

Fifth Intro: The latest Fixer comic she was reading had a bedroom scene. She wants to try it with you to see the appeal...(The one for bedroom speedrunners.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Kira of the Middle. Here she is. Kinda bratty. Has that Ricardo watching you both requested intro. Also, thank you everyone for 575 followers. I know people are worried over what may happen to Janitor ai, so if you have another platform you would want to see me on in the worst case, do let me know.

WORLD OF THE FINGERS BOTS

Here are all the other bots from the Syndicates of the City. List will be added onto as I make them. Will there be sinner id versions alongside the originals? Yes. How will it work? For me to figure out.

Matthias - Index Nursefather
creator: Bruhqw
